launchBatchProcessing() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.rightpanel.BatchWindow
Action on pressing the "Launch Batch" button, creates a BatchWorker, whose work is to process the whole input directory (by creating sub-workers).

The plug-in from which we consider the AnalysisSettings.
LDCService - Interface in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model
Service exposing the API for manipulating parameters, operations, and the general state used for the Lipid Droplet Characterization Fiji plugin.
